title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Phoenix Investment Management Limited
body: "Application number 5425  Applicant Phoenix Group Management Services Limited objected to the name used by Phoenix Investment Management Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 1 December 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Phoenix Investment Management Limited is changed to 16268938 Ltd. "
